Package <Unnamed>

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    CrossOverBehavior
    This is an interface for different Cross Over types
    Observer
    Observer interface has an update method
    SelectionBehavior
    This is an interface for different Selection types
    Subject
    Subject interface that has register remove and notify observer methods
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Chromosome  
    Driver
    Driver class
    DynamicPlot
    It represent a plot
    GeneticAlgorithm
    This class implements Subject interface and it has a template method named run
    OnePointCrossOver
    This class implements the OnePointCrossOver cross over type
    RankSelection
    This class implements the RankSelection selection type
    RouletteWheelSelection
    This class implements the RouletteWheelSelection selection type
    Screen
    This class represent the user interface screen
    TournamentSelection
    This class implements the TournamentSelection selection type
    TwoPointCrossOver
    This class implements the TwoPointsCrossOver cross over type
    Version1GA
    Version 1 will use roulette wheel selection and 1 point crossover.
    Version2GA
    Version 2 will use rank selection and 2 point crossover.
    Version3GA
    Version 3 will use tournament selection and 1 point crossover.
